item.title: AI Cobot Inspection System Automate Engine Quality Checks
item.description: Horse Powertrain has deployed the AI-powered Siemens Inspekto Visual Inspection system to automate quality checks at its engine production plant.

item.title: Cognex Launches In-Sight Vision Controller Powered by NVIDIA
item.description: Cognex launches a modular In-Sight Vision Controller powered by NVIDIA for customizable manufacturing inspections.

item.title: 3D Infotech Announces 40 Percent Metrology Automation Revenue Growth
item.description: 3D Infotech announces a 40% year-over-year revenue increase driven by strong demand for automated metrology solutions.

item.title: Renishaw Achieves Strongest Ever Q3 Performance on Global Manufacturing Demand
item.description: Renishaw reports record revenue driven by strong global demand from semiconductor, electronics, aerospace, and defense customers.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Systems Market Is Booming Worldwide | Cognex Corporation • Omron Corporation - openPR.com
item.description: The automated optical inspection systems market is experiencing significant global growth, driven by key players like Cognex and Omron.

item.title: Scalable, PC-Free AI Inspection with Cognex In-Sight 3900
item.description: Cognex introduces a new In-Sight 3900 system enabling scalable, high-resolution AI-based inspections for manufacturing.

item.title: Advanced chipmaking drives Taiwan inspection firms toward listings - Taiwan News
item.description: Taiwanese inspection firms are moving towards public listings driven by the demands of advanced chipmaking processes.
